invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破3150（基于ATR 18.8324和近期支撑）或融资费率Z-Score转为正值超过20%（显示空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 3150 (based on ATR 18.8324 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score turns positive above 20% (indicating short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破93000（基于ATR 569.8和近期低点）或融资费率Z-Score转为正值超过-10%（显示空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 93000 (based on ATR 569.8 and recent lows) or funding rate Z-Score turns positive above -10% (indicating short pressure easing).
